name: Sales by item Group
query:
SELECT
  i.item_group AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:210",

  SUM(CASE WHEN si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Total:Currency:170",

  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 1 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jan:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 2 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Feb:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 3 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Mar:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 4 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Apr:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 5 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "May:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 6 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jun:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 7 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jul:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 8 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Aug:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 9 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Sep:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 10 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Oct:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 11 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Nov:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 12 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Dec:Currency:120"

FROM
  `tabSales Invoice` si
JOIN
  `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN
  `tabSales Team` sp ON sp.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN
  `tabItem` i ON i.name = sii.item_code
WHERE
  si.docstatus = 1
  AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
  i.item_group
ORDER BY
  i.item_group
